overall.description: First-person driving footage through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through neon-lit downtown streets, passing under elevated highways and through commercial districts with heavy digital billboard presence. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with towering skyscrapers, glowing advertisements, and moderate traffic on wet reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with overhead digital billboards

events.description: initiating left turn at intersection with crosswalk
slowing down for intersection traffic control

agents.ego_description: driving through downtown Night City, approaching and navigating a left turn at an intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying advertisements overhead, spanning the width of the street
vehicle interior with glowing green HUD displays and illuminated control panels
vertical neon signage on building facades with bright pink and blue illumination
concrete overpass crossing above the street with embedded lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a neon-lit commercial boulevard. Massive curved digital billboards span overhead displaying advertisements, while the car's green-lit dashboard is visible in the foreground. The vehicle approaches an intersection with a crosswalk, slows down, and initiates a left turn under the glow of streetlights and building signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street running beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: completing left turn and entering street beneath elevated highway structure
passing under heavy overpass structure causing darker shadowed lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising under the elevated highway system, navigating between concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: oncoming traffic in the opposite lane with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with multiple lanes and support pillars
tall illuminated advertising columns with rotating digital displays
thick structural columns supporting the overhead highway deck

segments.scene_description: After completing the left turn, the vehicle enters a street running beneath an elevated highway. The environment becomes more enclosed as massive concrete support pillars line the road. Tall vertical neon signs illuminate the right side while the overhead highway structure blocks much of the sky, creating a darker, sheltered atmosphere with oncoming traffic visible in the opposite lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under elevated highway with illuminated safety barriers

events.description: passing pink and white illuminated barriers on the right side of the road
merging with moderate traffic flow under the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: cruising under the elevated highway alongside other vehicles, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the adjacent lane, maintaining similar speed

entered.detail: illuminated pink and white safety barriers lining the right side of the roadway
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway deck with graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through a narrow enclosed corridor beneath the elevated highway. Pink neon barriers line the right side of the road, casting a magenta glow on the wet asphalt. Massive concrete support pillars pass by on the left while the vehicle cruises alongside other traffic, the overhead highway deck creating a tunnel-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection district with tall commercial towers and street art

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind other vehicles at intersection
passing building facade featuring large decorative skull mural artwork
navigating through busy intersection with cross traffic

agents.ego_description: stopping at traffic lights and navigating through busy intersections with other vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: tan sedan stopped at red light ahead, waiting to proceed
group of pedestrians crossing at the crosswalk intersection

entered.detail: building facade with large decorative skull artwork and graffiti-style painting
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and reflective glass surfaces
overhead traffic lights displaying red and green signals with countdown timers

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway, the scene opens into a wide intersection district with tall glass skyscrapers. The vehicle stops at a red light behind a tan sedan, then proceeds through the intersection passing a distinctive building with a large skull mural on its facade. Pedestrians cross at the crosswalks while digital billboards and traffic signals illuminate the open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with outdoor dining and covered pedestrian walkways

events.description: passing restaurant district with outdoor seating and illuminated umbrellas
entering covered walkway section under building overhang

agents.ego_description: driving past commercial establishments with outdoor dining areas, entering covered corridor sections

notable_agents.action: people dining at outdoor tables under red umbrellas on the sidewalk

entered.detail: sidewalk cafe with red umbrellas, outdoor tables, and dining patrons
street passing under building overhang creating covered corridor sections
ground level shops with illuminated signage and display windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a commercial district featuring outdoor restaurant seating with distinctive red umbrellas on the right sidewalk. Patrons dine at tables while pedestrians walk along the street. The vehicle passes under building overhangs creating covered walkway sections, with ground-level storefronts and illuminated signs lining the left side of the narrow urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a bright, open commercial boulevard into a dark, enclosed urban corridor. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle, moving past massive curved digital billboards and a green-lit dashboard before slowing to initiate a left turn at a neon-lit intersection. As the vehicle completes the turn, the environment shifts from the open glow of the boulevard to a sheltered atmosphere beneath an elevated highway, where massive concrete support pillars begin to line the road. The scene then tightens into a narrow, tunnel-like corridor as the camera cruises alongside oncoming traffic, with pink neon barriers casting a magenta glow across the wet asphalt.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide, open intersection dominated by towering skyscrapers into a more intimate, narrow commercial corridor. It begins as the vehicle emerges from beneath a highway into a sprawling district of glass towers, pausing briefly behind a tan sedan at a red light. As the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, the camera passes a building featuring a large skull mural while pedestrians cross under the glow of digital billboards. The scene then shifts into a denser commercial zone, gliding past outdoor restaurant seating with distinctive red umbrellas and dining patrons on the right. Finally, the perspective moves under building overhangs, passing a sequence of illuminated storefronts and covered walkways that line the street.
